dev_mixed.notes: Mixed run: 20899 galaxies at 15 pts/gal. Contaminated by multiple extraction passes.

dev_clean.notes: Verified clean dev set: 3000 galaxies x 50 radii

big_base.notes: Full big base extraction: 48133 galaxies x 50 radii. Completed successfully per big_extraction.log.

ambiguity_29122_resolved.explanation: 29122 was NOT the number of galaxies in the big extraction. Per big_extraction_29122.py docstring: Exhaustive search showed 29122 is not achievable from any simple selection. The script name is a legacy reference. Actual quality-cut base: SubhaloFlag=1, Mstar>=1e8, n_star>=100, n_dm>=100, rhalf>0 => 48133 galaxies. The number 29122 appeared in an earlier binning analysis as binned_rows_after_ncut (n>=3) = 29122 from total binned_rows = 31319, applied to the DEV 3000-galaxy set.
